treatment_information.treatment_response: Symptoms resolved with treatment on IV antibiotics and transitioning to oral antibiotics

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with lethargy and was diagnosed with UTI
IV antibiotics started for UTI treatment
Transition to oral antibiotics for complete 5-day course upon discharge

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Continue follow-up with outpatient providers including palliative care, nephrology, and PCP
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient's activity status was out of bed with assistance
